from flask import Flask, request, g
from functools import wraps

app = Flask(__name__)


def require_auth(f):
    @wraps(f)
    def decorated(*args, **kwargs):
        token = request.headers.get("Authorization", "").replace("Bearer ", "")
        user = decode_jwt(token)
        if not user:
            return {"error": "Unauthorized"}, 401
        g.current_user = user
        return f(*args, **kwargs)
    return decorated


@app.route("/api/orders", methods=["GET"])
@require_auth
def list_orders():
    orders = get_orders_for_user(g.current_user["id"])
    return {"orders": orders}


@app.route("/api/orders", methods=["POST"])
@require_auth
def create_order():
    order = create_order_for_user(g.current_user["id"], request.json)
    return {"order": order}


@app.route("/api/profile", methods=["GET"])
@require_auth
def get_profile():
    profile = get_user_profile(g.current_user["id"])
    return {"profile": profile}


@app.route("/api/profile", methods=["PUT"])
@require_auth
def update_profile():
    profile = update_user_profile(g.current_user["id"], request.json)
    return {"profile": profile}
